violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the storage room, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the water fountain have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2025
The walk-in freezer was observed with an accumulation of ice build-up. Establishment is to run a defrost on unit. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2025
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2025

An excess of product and or items were observed in the storage area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2025
Misc. Food items were observed stored on the floor on the sales floor. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/26/2023

The outside dumpster is over full. The cardboard dumpster can not be closed. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. The area around the dumpster has an excess of litter and must be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 11/02/2023
